firmware.title: 11.0.2.BE82CF is available
firmware.description:
New version: 11.0.2.BE82CF

A new software update is available for your Android Smartphone.

This release includes the following:

• Android security patch upgraded to October 2021

If you choose not to do so now, the update will take place AUTOMATICALLY between 12AM and 6AM starting October 26th, 2021. Data rates may apply. Please do not turn off your device while the update is installing. During Installation you cannot use your device at all, even to dial 9-1-1.

firmware.title: 11.0.14.BE82CF is available
firmware.description:
New version: 11.0.14.BE82CF

A new software update is now available for your Android smartphone.

This release includes the following:

• Updated Android security patch to 2023-10-05.

If you choose not to update now, the update will be automatically applied between 2AM and 6AM starting on October 31st, 2023. Data rates may apply. Please refrain from turning off your device while the update is being installed. During the installation, your device will be temporarily unavailable, even for emergency calls to 9-1-1.
